title: Avoid Repeated Patterns Matching Empty String in Regular Expressions
description: Avoid using repeated patterns in regular expressions that match the empty string. This can lead to unintended behavior or redundancy.
recommendation: Review and refactor the regular expression to remove repeated patterns matching the empty string.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and unintended behavior.

checks.message: Review and refactor the regular expression to remove repeated patterns matching the empty string.
